channel.title: Solido/awesome-flutter Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Articles

Tutorial

  • Todo Liststars233 [227⭐] – Step by step tutorial how to build Todo List with Flutter by Andrei Lesnitsky

    • Articles

    Beginner

  • Roadmap to Flutter Developmentstars2k [1864⭐] - Visual roadmap with principles, patterns, and frameworks for Flutter newbies by Olexandr Leuschenko.

    • Articles

    Advanced

  • Rendering Pipeline [663👍] - Engine architecture by Adam Barth.

    • Components

    Demonstrations

  • Flutter Examplesstars5.5k [5426⭐] - Simple basic isolated apps for devs by Nishant Srivastava.
  • Flutter Catalogstars1.4k [1432⭐] - showcasing Flutter components, with side-by-side source code view, by X-Wei.
  • Generative Artstars367 [362⭐] - Generative Art by Robert Felker.

    • Components

    UI

  • StaggeredGridViewstars2k [1985⭐] - GridView with tiles of variable sizes by Romain Rastel.
  • Tinder Cardsstars601 [593⭐] - Tinder like cards swipe effect by Ivascu Adrian.
  • Flip Panelstars398 [391⭐] - Flip panel with built-in animation by HungHD.
  • Liquid Pull To Refreshstars809 [789⭐] - A beautiful and custom refresh indicator by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Before Afterstars480 [470⭐] - Beautiful slider which makes it easier to display the difference between two images, by Sahil Kumar.
  • Scratcherstars239 [228⭐] - Scratch card widget which temporarily hides content from user, by Kamil Rykowski.
  • Beautiful_Popupstars380 [371⭐] - Beautify your app popup by jaweii.
  • Flutter Neumorphicstars1.1k [1016⭐] - Ready to use Neumorphic kit for Flutter with 🕶️ dark mode.
  • Doughstars272 [264⭐] - Widgets for a squishy user interface by Josiah Saunders.
  • Timelinesstars292 [275⭐] - Powerful & Easy to use timeline package by Chulwoo Park.
  • Timeline Tilestars329 [318⭐] - A tile to help build beautiful and customisable timelines by Julio Bitencourt.
  • Radial Menustars362 [361⭐] - Animated Radial Menu by Victor Choueiri.
  • Facebook Reactionsstars224 [226⭐] - Facebook reactions widget by Duy Tran.
  • Flushbarstars785 [777⭐] - Highly configurable Snackbar by Andre Haueisen.
  • Stepper Touchstars215 [211⭐] - Lateral value stepper nicely animated by Raouf Rahiche.
  • Typeaheadstars499 [491⭐] - Display overlay suggestions to users as they type by Abdul Rahman Al Hamali.
  • Snapliststars335 [327⭐] - Create snappable list views by David Leibovych.
  • Pin Codestars190 [187⭐] - Animated & customisable Pin code for login and OTP by Liew Jun Tung.
  • Folding Cellstars359 [357⭐] - Fold your widget by Faob.
  • Image Sequence Animatorstars79 [75⭐] - A simple widget for animating a set of images with full custom controls as an alternative to using a GIF file by Ali Yigit Bireroglu.
  • Credit Card Formstars219 [213⭐] - Animated credit card input form Origogi.
  • Flutter Tagsstars260 [256⭐] - Tags with different customizations by Di Natale Antonino.
  • Card Settingsstars269 [264⭐] - package for building settings forms by codegrue.

    • Components

    Sticky Headers

  • Sticky Infinite Liststars213 [203⭐] - Highly configurable multi directional infinite list with Sticky Headers by TatsuUkraine.
  • Sticky Headerstars616 [608⭐] - Sliver based sticky headers by Romain Rastel.
  • Sticky Headersstars659 [644⭐] - Configurable sticky headers by Simon Lightfoot.

    • Components

    Drawers

  • Flutter Inner Drawerstars295 [287⭐] - Easy way to create an internal drawer (left / right) where you can enter a list-menu or other by Di Natale Antonino.
  • Hidden Drawer Menustars205 [200⭐] - Beautiful drawer mode menu feature with perspective animations by Rafael Almeida Barbosa.

    • Components

    Bottom bars

  • Fancy Bottom Navigationstars473 [465⭐] - Animated bottom navigation by Tony Owen.
  • Bottom Navy Barstars686 [668⭐] - Beautiful and colorful animated bottom navigation bar by Pedro Massango.
  • Circular Bottom Navigationstars379 [370⭐] - Beautiful animated bottom navigation bar by Iman Khoshabi.
  • Google Nav Barstars334 [314⭐] - A modern google style nav bar for flutter by Sooxt98.

    • Components

    Bottom Sheets

  • Rubber Bottom Sheetstars358 [352⭐] - Elastic material bottom sheet by Mattia Crovero.
  • Modal Bottom Sheetstars866 [845⭐] - Modal bottom sheet with Material, Cupertino iOS13 or custom appareance by Jaime Blasco.

    • Components

    UI Helpers

  • Reorderablesstars365 [357⭐] - Drag&Drop Table, Row, Column, Wrap(Grid) and SliverList elements by Hansheng Chiu.
  • Liquid Pull To Refreshstars809 [789⭐] - A beautiful and custom refresh indicator by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Offlinestars659 [651⭐] - Tidy utility to handle offline/online connectivity by Jeremiah Ogbomo.
  • ShowCaseViewstars532 [513⭐] - Way to showcase your app features on iOS and Android by Simform.
  • Infinite Listviewstars159 [150⭐] - Infinite scroll in both directions by Simon Lightfoot.

    • Components

    Material Design

  • Slidablestars1.7k [1731⭐] - Slidable list item with left and right slide actions by Romain Rastel.
  • Unicorn Speed Dialstars273 [265⭐] - Floating Action Button with Speed Dial by Tiago Martins.

    • Components

    Effect

  • Shimmerstars1.2k [1205⭐] - Shimmer effect while content is loading by HungHD.
  • Clay Containersstars312 [303⭐] - Neumorphic widget primitives to serve as the foundation of your own designs by Michael Charles.
  • Parallaxstars667 [660⭐] - ViewPager by Iiro Krankka.
  • Wavestars579 [567⭐] - Displaying some waves with custom color, duration, floating and blur effects by RockerFlower.
  • PhotoFiltersstars247 [234⭐] - Apply filters to an image by Sharafudheen KK.

    • Components

    Calendar

  • Calendar Widgetstars146 [142⭐] - Calendar widget by David Bennett.
  • Table Calendarstars959 [930⭐] - Calendar organized neatly into a Table, with vertical autosizing by Aleksander Woźniak.
  • Time Plannerstars31 [26⭐] - A beautiful, easy to use and customizable time planner for flutter mobile, desktop and web by Mohammad Jamalianpour.

    • Components

    Login

  • Login Animationstars972 [962⭐] - Smooth animation from login to home by Ruchika Gupta.

    • Components

    Backend-Driven

  • Dynamic Widgetstars912 [894⭐] - Build your dynamic UI with json, and the json format is very similar with flutter widget code by Denny Deng.

    • Components

    Image

  • Carousel Sliderstars1k [1019⭐] - Carousel slider widget, support infinite scroll and custom child widget by serenader.
  • Photo Viewstars1.3k [1300⭐] - Scalable image view with loading placeholder by Renan C. Araújo.
  • SVGstars1.1k [1126⭐] - SVG parsing, rendering, and widget library by Dan Field.
  • Image Cropperstars750 [734⭐] - Crop your images support ratio, rotation, zoom by HungHD.
  • Cached Network Imagestars1.7k [1686⭐] - Show images from the internet and keep them in the cache directory by.
  • Multi Image Pickerstars902 [896⭐] - Display multi image picker by Radoslav Vitanov.
  • Cropstars119 [113⭐] - Crop any widget/image in Android, iOS, Web and Desktop by Mahdi K. Fard.

    • Components

    Image Picker

  • WeChat Assets Pickerstars522 [466⭐] - Assets picker in WeChat style, support multi assets by Alex Li.

    • Components

    Map

  • Google Map Viewstars409 [409⭐] - Displaying google map plugin by AppTree Software.
  • GeoCoderstars139 [136⭐] - Forward and reverse geocoding by Aloïs Deniel.
  • Mapbox GLstars246 [244⭐] - Interactive, customizable vector maps by Mapbox.
  • AMapstars480 [478⭐] - Access to AMap services(高德地图) by fluttify-project.

    • Components

    Charts

  • Chartsstars2.2k [2184⭐] - By Google Charts Team.
  • Candlesticksstars328 [323⭐] - OHLC and Trade Volume Charts by Trent Piercy.
  • FChartsstars319 [318⭐] - Beautiful, responsive, animated charts by Keenan Thompson.
  • FL Chartstars3k [2887⭐] - Draw fantastic charts in Flutter by Iman Khoshabi.
  • Bezier Chartstars359 [353⭐] - Beautiful bezier line chart widget for flutter that is highly interactive and configurable by Diego Velasquez.
  • Echartsstars447 [435⭐] - Large collection of advanced reactives charts by LIN Chen.
  • Graphicstars186 [178⭐] - Data visualization library based on the Grammar of Graphics by LIN Chen.
  • Circular Chartstars337 [333⭐] - Animated radial and pie charts by Victor Choueiri.
  • Sparklinestars228 [226⭐] - Sparkline by Victor Choueiri.

    • Components

    Navigation

  • Flurostars3.1k [3122⭐] - The brightest, hippest, coolest router for Flutter with Navigation, wildcard, query, transitions by Posse.
  • Getstars3.3k [3099⭐] - Navigate between screens & display snackbars/dialogs/bottomSheets without context by Jonny Borges.
  • PageView Indicatorstars119 [116⭐] - Build page indicators for the PageView by Leo Cavalcante.

    • Components

    Auth

  • Facebook Loginstars392 [389⭐] - Authenticate with native Android & iOS Facebook login SDKs by Iiro Krankka.
  • OAuthstars162 [160⭐] - Buffer, Strava, Unsplash, Github OAuth by Joe Birch.
  • Loginstars597 [593⭐] - FaceID, TouchID, and Fingerprint Reader by Rody Davis.

    • Components

    Text & Rich Content

  • Markdownstars819 [815⭐] - Markdown renderer for Flutter. It supports the original format, but no inline html.
  • Zefyrstars1.9k [1904⭐] - Soft & gentle rich text editor by Memspacestars1.9k.
  • AutoSizeTextstars1.3k [1237⭐] - Automatically resizes text to fit perfectly within its bounds by Simon Leier.
  • Parsed Textstars148 [144⭐] - Interactive text based on content recognition, also supports Regex by Fayeed Pawaskar.
  • TeXstars165 [164⭐] - Render Mathematics Equations with full HTML and JavaScript support by Shahzad Akram.
  • Masked Textstars231 [230⭐] - Masked text with custom and monetary formatting by Ben-hur Santos Ott.

    • Components

    Analytics

  • Usagestars112 [111⭐] - Google Analytics wrapper for command-line, web, and Flutter apps.

    • Components

    Styling

  • Flutterialstars1.3k [1246⭐] - Flutter Material Theme explorer by Erick Ghaumez.

    • Components

    Audio

  • Audio Recorderstars159 [158⭐] - Record audio and store it locally by Jordan Alcaraz.
  • Flutter Soundstars549 [536⭐] - Flutter audio recorder and player at one hand by dooboolab.
  • AssetsAudioPlayerstars484 [468⭐] Simultaneous playback of audio from assets/network/file and displaying notifications [android / ios / web / macos]

    • Components

    Video

  • WebRTCstars2.3k [2206⭐] - WebRTC plugin for iOS/Android by CloudWebRtc.
  • Chewiestars1.2k [1176⭐] - Provides low-level access to video playback by Brian Egan.
  • Video Trimmerstars200 [191⭐] - Visualise and trim videos by Souvik Biswas.
  • CamerAwesomestars209 [203⭐] - Community camera plugin rework by Apparence.io studio.

    • Components

    Monetization

  • Inapp Purchasestars426 [416⭐] - Features set of 'in app purchase' derived from react-native-iapstars1.8k by dooboolab.

    • Templates

  • TodoMVCstars6.9k [6867⭐] - TODO application ready to go with different flavors : Vanilla, Redux, built_redux by Brian Egan.
  • Restaurant Menustars534 [532⭐] - Restaurant menu by Braulio Cassule.
  • UI Challengesstars1.2k [1211⭐] - Profile, Travel, Food App by Tomi Alagbe.
  • Dashboardstars778 [771⭐] - Dashboard and Shop Items by Ivascu Adrian.
  • Todostars499 [495⭐] - Todo template from Dribble by Marc L.
  • The Gorgeous Loginstars1.4k [1357⭐] - Design and smooth login template by Hugo Extrat.
  • Featherstars397 [392⭐] - Beautiful weather application. Application includes RxDart, Dio, BLoC, i18n, unit and widget tests. by Jakub Homlala.
  • FlutterFoodybitestars941 [914⭐] - Beautiful food app UI template by JideGuru.
  • Flutter Samplesstars2.1k [2106⭐] - Collection of nice flutter samples by Diego Velásquez.
  • ActingWeb First_Appstars239 [235⭐] - Starter app with basic elements for a team-developed production-quality app by Greger Wedel.
  • Smart Washing Machinestars470 [464⭐] - Smart washing machine UI challenge app with Box2D physic engine by Tomasz Pawlikowski.
  • Movie Detailsstars367 [365⭐] - Movie details page by Iiro Krankka.
  • Matesstars453 [449⭐] - How to load profiles from the randomuser.me API and a nice profile details page by Iiro Krankka.
  • Weatherstars139 [139⭐] - Weather app to learn how to use Canvas and Animation by Alessandro Aime.
  • Cupertino Settingsstars170 [163⭐] - iOS Settings by Matthias Rupp.
  • Card Swipe Animationstars413 [410⭐] - Swipe cards template by Ruchika Gupta.
  • UI Kitstars5.4k [5392⭐] - Collection of useful UIs in a UIKit by Pawan Kumar.
  • Bookstars283 [282⭐] - Bookshelf by Ardiansyah Putra.
  • Liquid Pay Payment Appstars237 [235⭐] - Liquid Pay App Concept by Long Hoang.
  • DrawAppstars188 [186⭐] - Sample Drawing App to demonstrate how to allow user to draw onto canvas with color picker and brush thickness slider by Jake Gough.
  • Starter Kitstars561 [561⭐] - App Store implementation to learn Bloc, RxDart, Sqflite, Fluro and Dio. by King Wu.
  • Clone UI Challengesstars1.1k [1131⭐] - Collection of useful UIs clones by Javier González.
  • Beautiful Timelinesstars135 [130⭐] - A set of beautiful timelines by Julio Bitencourt.

    • Templates

    Machine Learning

  • MLKitstars361 [358⭐] - Firebase Machine Learning Kit by Naoya Yoshizawa.
  • m2genstars1.8k [1784⭐] - CLI tool to convert ML models into native Dart code by BayesWitnesses.

    • Templates

    Vision

  • Google Mobile Visionstars412 [412⭐] - Google Mobile Vision by Eduardo Folly.
  • ML Vision Camera Streamstars187 [179⭐] - ML vision recognitions (QRcode, face, ...) with live camera stream by Aumard Jimmy and Santetis.

    • Templates

    Augmented Reality

  • ARKit Pluginstars531 [521⭐] - Wrapper for ARKit - Apple's augmented reality platform for iOS by Olexandr Leuschenko.
  • ARCore Pluginstars261 [253⭐] - Augmented reality with ARCore platform by Gian Marco Di Francesco.

    • Plugins

    Device

  • Local Notificationsstars1.5k [1471⭐] - Plugin for displaying local notifications by Michael Bui.
  • InAppWebViewstars1.4k [1332⭐] - Add inline WebView widgets or open an in-app browser window by Lorenzo Pichilli.
  • File Pickerstars543 [531⭐] - Native file explorer to load absolute file path by Miguel Ruivo.
  • WebViewstars1.3k [1303⭐] - Render web content by Hadrien Lejard.
  • Locationstars731 [720⭐] - Handle location, handling callbacks to get continuous location by Lyokone.
  • Geolocationstars206 [206⭐] - Fully featured geolocation plugin: current location, location updates, geocode, places and more by Loup.
  • Badgerstars202 [197⭐] - Update app badge on the launcher by Edouard Marquez.
  • UDIDstars151 [151⭐] - Persistent UDID across app reinstalls by Leon Kukuk.
  • Downloaderstars560 [551⭐] - Create and manage download tasks by HungHD.

    • Plugins

    Bluetooth / NFC / Beacon

  • Bluestars1.7k [1638⭐] - Bluetooth by Paul DeMarco.
  • NFC Readerstars242 [243⭐] - NFC reader plugin for iOS and Android by Matteo Crippa.
  • NFC Managerstars54 [52⭐] - Generic NFC plugin for iOS and Android by Naoki Okada.
  • Beaconsstars73 [73⭐] - Flutter beacons plugin by Loup.

    • Plugins

    Storage

  • Sqflitestars2.1k [2075⭐] - SQLite flutter plugin by Alexandre Roux.

    • Plugins

    Services

  • OneSignalstars444 [433⭐] - Push notification service by OneSignal.
  • Dialogflowstars170 [168⭐] - Plugin to easily integrate with dialogflow by Victor Rances.

    • Frameworks

    Standard

  • Blocstars7k [6920⭐] - Collection of packages that help implement the BLoC design pattern by Felix Angelov.
  • MobXstars1.9k [1866⭐] - Supercharge the state-management in your apps with Transparent Functional Reactive Programming (TFRP). Port of MobX from the Js/React land.
  • Providerstars3.6k [3499⭐] - State-management library for Flutter by Remi Rousselet.
  • RiverPodstars1.5k [1471⭐] - Provider, but different by Remi Rousselet.
  • Binderstars156 [153⭐] - A lightweight, yet powerful way to bind your application state with your business logic, by Romain Rastel.

    • Frameworks

    Redux / ELM / Dependency Injection

  • Reduxstars1.5k [1446⭐] - Built to work with redux.dartstars466, utilities that allow you to easily consume a Redux Store to build Widgets.
  • Fishstars7k [7018⭐] - Alibaba Redux implementation.
  • Injectstars830 [832⭐] - Compile-time dependency injection by Google.
  • Async Redux [174⭐] - Redux without boilerplate. Allows for both sync and async reducers by Marcelo Glasberg.

    • Frameworks

    Widgets

  • Hooksstars1.7k [1694⭐] - Advanced code sharing between widgets by Remi Rousselet.
  • Functional widgetstars390 [382⭐] - Code generator writing widgets as functions with annotations by Remi Rousselet.
  • Form Builderstars760 [740⭐] - Framework that simplifies building forms, validating fields, reacting to changes, and collecting the final user input by Danvick Miller.

    • Frameworks

    Data

  • Graphqlstars2.6k [2536⭐] - Implementation of the GraphQL spec by Zino App B.V..
  • GeoFlutterFirestars213 [212⭐] - Implementation of GeoFirestore for flutter by Darshan Gowda.
  • Ferrystars178 [165⭐] - Powerful & Extensible GraphQL Client by Sat Mandir Khalsa.

    • Frameworks

    Animation

  • SpinKitstars2.2k [2190⭐] - Animated loading indicators by Jeremiah Ogbomo.
  • Drawing Animationstars337 [334⭐] - Create drawing line animations based on SVG path data by Carl Hauck.
  • Flutter-animation-setstars220 [218⭐] - Easy to build an animation set by efoxTeam.
  • Staggered Animationsstars809 [784⭐] - Easily add staggered animations to your ListView, GridView, Column and Row by mobiten.
  • Sequence Animationstars292 [287⭐] - Composite staggered animations by Norbert Kozsir.
  • Villainsstars296 [294⭐] - Page transition animations by Norbert Kozsir.
  • AnimatedTextKitstars1k [1021⭐] - A collection of cool text animations by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Funvasstars202 [188⭐] - Create fun time based canvas animations by creativecreatorormaybenot.

    • Frameworks

    Testing

  • Flutter Gherkinstars128 [124⭐] - Fully featured Gherkin parser and UI automated test runner by Jon Samwell.

    • Frameworks

    Web

  • Responsive Frameworkstars523 [506⭐] - Automatically adapt UI to different screen sizes. Responsiveness made simple by Codelessly.

    • Experimental

  • styled_widgetstars483 [459⭐] - Simplifying your widget tree structure by defining widgets using methods by Rein Gundersen Bentdal.

    • Engines

    Rendering

  • Graphxstars234 [227⭐] - Making drawings and animations extremely simple, inspired by Flash, by Roi Peker.

    • Engines

    Game

  • Flamestars4.3k [4190⭐] - Minimalist game engine by Luan Nico.
  • SpriteWidgetstars1.1k [1147⭐] - Toolkit for building complex, high performance animations and 2D games by Viktor Lidholt.

    • Engines

    Open source games

  • TRexstars300 [292⭐] - Port of the famous Chrome's Trex game by Renan C. Araújo.
  • Crushstars380 [378⭐] - How to build a Math-3 game, like Candy Crush, Bejeweled by Didier Boelens.
  • Slide Puzzlestars119 [112⭐] - Classic slide (15) puzzle by Kevin Moore.
  • Tetrisstars1.2k [1155⭐] - Tetris game by YangBin.
  • Flipstars192 [192⭐] - Reversi game by Andrew Brogdon.

    • Open Source Apps

    Premium

  • History Of Everythingstars5.6k [5539⭐] - Animated vertical timeline of humanity by 2D, Inc.
  • Developer Queststars2.8k [2827⭐] - Become a tech lead, slay bugs by 2D, Inc.

    • Open Source Apps

    Top

  • Flutter Team Samplesstars9.7k [9605⭐] - Collection of examples (including maps, json, Material and Cupertino) by the Flutter team.
  • Flutter Common Widgetsstars22.6k [22597⭐] - Collection of official widgets demos & docs in chinese to help developers learn quickly by Alibaba Auction Frontend Team.
  • Planetsstars688 [684⭐] - Planet exploration that demonstrate rich UI by Sergi Martínez.
  • NewsBuzzstars472 [471⭐] - Firebase backed news reader using News API by Ankur Kedia.
  • Music Playerstars1.2k [1231⭐] - Full featured music player by Pawan Kumar.
  • WhatTodostars834 [826⭐] - Todoist like UI by Burhanuddin Rashid.
  • FlutterGramstars1.7k [1705⭐] - Complete Instagram based on Firestore & Google Functions by MDanics.
  • BookSearchstars446 [443⭐] - Digital BookShelf for your reading progress by Norbert515.
  • Cinematicstars797 [795⭐] - UI for Movie DB Public API by Aaron Oertel.
  • Beer-Me-Upstars418 [418⭐] - Beer tracking nicely designed by Benoit Letondor.
  • Tracestars683 [668⭐] - Modern and powerful crypto portfolio & market explorer by Trent Piercy.
  • Taskiststars664 [655⭐] - Taskist is a ToDo List app for Task Management by Hugo EXTRAT.
  • Tourismstars237 [236⭐] - Tourism app based on redux w/ animations & i18n by blueMixstars237.
  • Trinity Orientation @ Univ Torontostars510 [508⭐] - Orientation week at Trinity College, U of T by Matthew Tory.
  • Deerstars274 [272⭐] - Minimalist Todo Planner built using BLoC pattern by Aleksander Woźniak.
  • Instorystars189 [187⭐] - Instgram story downloader with a beautiful UI Sarath.
  • Spacex-Gostars573 [564⭐] - Simple yet powerful, open-source SpaceX launch tracker. jesusrp98.
  • Replystars513 [509⭐] - 'Reply' Material Design case study by Frederik Schweiger.
  • Timy Messengerstars1.7k [1650⭐] - Group messaging app with a focus on organizing events by Miguel Beltran and Franz Heinfling.
  • GitJournalstars1.3k [1221⭐] - Journaling your data in a Git Repo by Vishesh Handa.
  • AuthPassstars638 [622⭐] - Keepass compatible password manager for mobile and desktop by hpoul.
  • Fwitterstars1.2k [1173⭐] - Full Twitter clone using Firebase solution by Sonu Sharma.
  • Harpystars380 [260⭐] - A feature rich Twitter client by Roberto Doering.
  • Meme Chatstars496 [493⭐] - Chat app on Flutter, using Firebase, Google Sign In, and device camera integration by a team of Googlers.

    • Utilities

  • Redux Starter/Code Generatorstars266 [266⭐] - Starter project and code generator with Redux support by Hillel Coren.
  • FVMstars1.6k [1472⭐] - Flutter Version Management: A simple cli to manage Flutter SDK versions.
  • Flutter Flavorizrstars116 [111⭐] - CLI utility to easily generate flavors for Android and iOS in less than 3 minutes by Angelo Cassano.
  • FlutterGenstars612 [608⭐] - Assets code generator for your images, fonts, colors, etc — Get rid of String-based APIs.
  • Very Good Clistars720 [685⭐] - Very Good Command Line Interface for Dart created by Very Good Ventures.
  • FlutterIcon [274⭐] - Icon set generator by Mike Hoolehan.
  • Fontifystars63 [62⭐] - CLI tool to convert SVG icons to OTF font and generate Flutter-compatible class by Igor Kharakhordin.
  • Zeplin Extensionsstars33 - Zeplin code generator by yutae.
  • Pixel Perfectstars23 - Development tool to compare your layouts with design mockups by Kherel.

    • Utilities

    IntelliJ / Android Studio

  • Enhancement_Suitestars164 [154⭐] - Search for pub.dev libraries, update version, Bloc, Snippet, etc you're covered by Marius Höfler.

    • Utilities

    Desktop

  • Desktop Embeddingstars6.8k [6828⭐] - Desktop implementations of the Flutter embedding API by Google.
  • Golang Desktop Embedderstars4.8k [4728⭐] - Golang embedder for desktop by Pierre Champion.
  • Rust Desktop Embedderstars1.7k [1733⭐] - Rust embedder for desktop by juju.
  • Raspberry Pi Embedderstars577 [557⭐] - Light-weight Embedder for Raspberry Pi by Hannes Winkler.

    • Videos

  • Mtechviral [235🎬] - [Hindi/English] Mtechviral Series By Pawan Kumar.

    • Components

    Sliders

  • RangeSliderstars267 [258⭐] - 2-thumb configurable RangeSlider by Didier Boelens.
  • Fluid Sliderstars244 [240⭐] - A slider with a minimal design and fluid like animation by Vamsi Krishna.
  • Flutter Xliderstars279 [274⭐] - A material design slider and range slider, horizontal and vertical, with RTL support by Ali-Azmoud.

    • Components

    Cupertino Design

  • Peek & Popstars170 [168⭐] - Peek & Pop implementation based on the iOS functionality by Ali Yigit Bireroglu.

    • Components

    Voice

  • Speech Recognitionstars307 [305⭐] - Speech to text by Erick Ghaumez.

    • Components

    Storage

  • Secure Storagestars604 [594⭐] - Keychain and Keystore storage by German Saprykin.

    • Templates

    Clone

  • GitTouchstars728 [703⭐] - Open source mobile client for GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket and Gitea by Rongjian Zhang.

    • Plugins

    Scanner

  • Fast QR Reader Viewstars258 [256⭐] - Live multicode reader by Facundo Medica.

    • Bonus

    Fun

  • The One [404👍]

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Components

Bottom bars

  • Titled Navigation Barstars245 [239⭐] - Animated bottom navigation bar that switch between icon and title by Pedro Massango.

    • Components

    UI Helpers

  • Scroll To Indexstars257 [244⭐] - Scroll to specified child element with given index for SliverList/ListView by Jerry Chen.

    • Components

    Image

  • Parallax Imagestars230 [225⭐] - Image parallax by Anatoly Pulyaevskiy.
  • Bitmapstars107 [105⭐] - Perform Bitmap manipulations (such as contrast and exposure) with a help from the Dart FFI by Renan C. Araújo.

    • Components

    Auth

  • SimpleAuthstars281 [278⭐] - Azure Active Directory, Amazon, Dropbox, Facebook, Github, Google, Instagram, Linked In, Microsoft Live Connect, Github, OAuth, Basic Auth by James Clancey.
  • Flutter AppAuthstars149 [149⭐] - Plugin that provides a wrapper around the AppAuth iOS and Android SDKs by Michael Bui.

    • Components

    Text & Rich Content

  • Code Fieldstars43 - Customizable code field widget supporting syntax highlighting by Bertrand Bevillard.

    • Components

    Monetization

  • Square In-App Payments SDKstars264 [262⭐] - Take payments by embedding a card entry form in your app that produces nonces from customer-provided card information or digital wallets by Square.

    • Plugins

    Bluetooth / NFC / Beacon

  • Beacon broadcaststars67 [68⭐] - Library for turning your phone into a beacon by Paulina Szklarska.
  • Reactive Blestars176 [166⭐] - Handles BLE operations for multiple devices by Philips Hue.

    • Engines

    Open source games

  • Ghost Riggerstars132 [131⭐] - Ghost Rigger is a cyberpunk inspired puzzle game by Iain Smith and Julio Ernesto Rodríguez Cabañas.

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Components

Effect

  • Shinestars136 [135⭐] - Pretty shadows with dynamic light positions by Jonathan Monga.

    • Components

    Internationalization

  • GenLangstars84 [84⭐] - Code generator for Internationalization by King Wu.
  • Flutter Translatestars250 [246⭐] - Internationalization (i18n) library by Florin Bratan.

    • Engines

    Open source games

  • 2048stars178 [178⭐] - 2048 game by Anuran Barman.
  • Party Charadesstars154 [153⭐] - Party charades by Kamil Rykowski.

    • Open Source Apps

    Top

  • Superhero Interactionstars217 [216⭐] - Cool Superhero interaction animation by Pinkesh Darji.

    • Utilities

  • Environment Configurationstars75 [66⭐] - CLI tool to generate .env configurations for application environments by TatsuUkraine.

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Components

Image

  • Lottiestars159 [157⭐] - Use airbnb's popular After Effects Animation library by Cameron Smith.

    • Components

    Navigation

  • Deep Link Navigationstars46 [47⭐] - Elegant abstraction for complete deep linking navigation in Flutter by Dennis Krasnov.

    • Components

    Auth

  • Apple Sign-Instars157 [155⭐] - Apple sign in by Tom Gilder.

    • Components

    Analytics

  • Pure Mixpanelstars22 [22⭐] - Analytics for the popular Mixpanel.com Nick Manning.

    • Components

    Styling

  • Pigmentstars156 [148⭐] - Simple but useful package for use colors in flutter.

    • Templates

  • Music Playerstars201 [199⭐] - music player component by Tobe O.

    • Plugins

    Device

  • AppAvailabilitystars63 [63⭐] - List, launch and check installed apps by Lorenzo Pichilli.

    • Plugins

    Scanner

  • QR Code Readerstars213 [210⭐] - QR Code reader plugin by Matheus Villela.

    • Plugins

    Services

  • Intercom [23⭐] - Add Intercom integration to your app by Maido Kaara.
  • Place Dialogstars45 [45⭐] - Places picker dialog returning the places to the app by David Bennett.
  • App Ratingstars26 [26⭐] - Requesting and Writing Reviews for the App Store and Google Play by Rody Davis.

    • Frameworks

    Redux / ELM / Dependency Injection

  • Built reduxstars81 [80⭐] - Automatic subscribing to your redux stores. Based on the built pattern by David Marne.
  • Fluxstars356 [355⭐] - Implementation of the Flux framework by Google.

    • Open Source Apps

    Top

  • Flitterstars182 [182⭐] - Glitter app by Hadrien Lejard and Kevin Segaud. It uses Redux and Jaguar.
  • Limestars349 [348⭐] - Lime social network by Sebastian Sellmair.
  • DroidKaigi2018-flutterstars496 [493⭐] - Unofficial conference app for DroidKaigi 2018 Tokyo by konifar.
  • TailorMadestars220 [219⭐] - Managing a Fashion designer's daily routine using a mixture of ReBLoC w/ Firebase Cloud Store & Functions by Jeremiah Ogbomo.

    • Community

    cm Cameroon

  • Twitter Flutter Cameroon
  • Telegram Flutter & Dart Community CM

item.description:

Introduction

    • Articles

    Advanced

  • Render Objects - What are Widgets, RenderObjects and Elements? by Norbert515.
  • Rendering Engine Tutorial - Flutter's Rendering Engine: A Tutorial by AbdulRahman AlHamali.
  • Accessibility widgets - Deep dive information about all aspects of accessibility by Muhammed Salih Güler.
  • Profiling w/ Timeline - Using the Timeline allows you to find and address specific performance issues in your application by Chinmay Garde.

    • Articles

    Howtos

  • Build Flavor - Define build configurations and switch them by Salvatore Giordano.

    • Components

    Effect

  • Liquid Swipestars722 - Liquid swipe to your stacked containers by Sahdeep Singh.

    • Components

    Auth

  • Firebase Phone Auth - Phone number auth via SMS by Gildásio Filho.

    Audio

  • Flutter Audio Recorderstars80 - Provides full controls and access to recording details such as level metering by Wenyan Li.
